message:
feat(web): Add swipe gesture hints for first-time mobile users

- Create SwipeHint component with animated left/right indicators
- Create useSwipeHint hook for localStorage-persisted dismissal
- Integrate hint into SwipeablePromptCard (shows on first card only)
- One-time overlay teaches swipe left (copy) and swipe right (basket)
- "Got it" button dismisses permanently via localStorage

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,74 @@ +"use client"; + +/** + * SwipeHint - One-time hint overlay for mobile swipe gestures. + * + * Teaches users about swipe actions (left = copy, right = basket) + * on their first visit. Persisted to localStorage so it only shows once. + */ + +import { motion } from "framer-motion"; +import { ArrowLeft, ArrowRight, Copy, ShoppingBag } from "lucide-react"; +import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button"; + +interface SwipeHintProps { + onDismiss: () => void; +} + +export function SwipeHint({ onDismiss }: SwipeHintProps) { + return ( + +
+
+ {/* Left swipe indicator */} + + +
+ + Copy +
+ + + {/* Divider */} +
+ + {/* Right swipe indicator */} + +
+ + Basket +
+ + +
+ +

+ Swipe cards for quick actions +

+ + +
+ + ); +}
